Permutation k-sample MMD: summed pairwise unbiased MMD^2 under joint relabel

Source: R/RcppExports.R
permutation_ksample_mmd_cpp.Rd

Given the pooled (N x N) kernel matrix of K stacked groups and their sizes, draws n_perm joint relabelings of the pooled sample into the original group sizes and returns, for each, the summed pairwise unbiased MMD^2 statistic \(\sum_{a < b} \mathrm{MMD}^2_u(a, b)\). The single shared relabeling per replicate (not independent per-pair permutation) is what makes this a valid k-sample null. Relabeling uses r_randperm, so callers honour set.seed().

Usage

permutation_ksample_mmd_cpp(K_pool, sizes, n_perm)

Arguments

K_pool

(N x N) kernel matrix of the row-stacked groups.

sizes

Integer vector of the K group sizes (summing to N).

n_perm

Number of permutations.

Value

Vector of n_perm summed-pairwise MMD^2 values under the null.

On this page
